evals.prompt: space-themed math worksheet with addition and multiplication, grade 3
evals.expected_output: A single-page print-ready HTML file with space theme (#1E3A8A), addition and multiplication problems at grade 3 difficulty, an SVG space illustration, a word root factoid banner, and a fun fact or ELA question. Layout planned at most once (no replanning needed for a simple 1-page sheet).
expectations: An HTML file named worksheet-*.html is written to disk
The HTML contains the space theme primary color #1E3A8A
The HTML contains multiplication problems (× symbol in a .math div)
The HTML contains addition problems (+ symbol in a .math div or vertical format)
The HTML contains a word root factoid banner (class factoid-banner or text 'word root')
The HTML contains an SVG illustration or emoji fallback image cell
A layout_plan.txt file is saved alongside the HTML, and it contains 'Row 1' at most 2 times (at most 1 replan for a 1-page worksheet)

evals.prompt: unicorn math worksheet grade 3 with multiplication, division, addition, and subtraction
evals.expected_output: A single-page print-ready HTML worksheet with unicorn theme (#7C3AED), all four operation types present, shuffled, with a word root factoid and ELA/fun fact. Layout planned at most twice (initial + at most 1 replan).
expectations: An HTML file named worksheet-*.html is written to disk
The HTML contains the unicorn theme primary color #7C3AED
The HTML contains multiplication problems (× symbol)
The HTML contains division problems (÷ symbol)
The HTML contains addition problems (+ symbol in math context)
The HTML contains subtraction problems (− or - symbol in math context)
The HTML contains a word root factoid banner (class factoid-banner or text 'word root')
The HTML contains an SVG illustration or emoji fallback image cell
A layout_plan.txt file is saved alongside the HTML, and it contains 'Row 1' at most 2 times (at most 1 replan for a 1-page worksheet)

evals.prompt: dinosaur math worksheet grade 4, 20 problems: word problems, multiplication, fractions
evals.expected_output: A 2-page print-ready HTML worksheet with dinosaur theme (#16A34A), ~20 problems across word problems, multiplication, and fractions at grade 4 difficulty. Each page has its own word root factoid banner and illustration. Layout planned at most 4 times total (at most 2 replans per page).
expectations: An HTML file named worksheet-*.html is written to disk
The HTML contains exactly 2 .page divs
The HTML contains the dinosaur theme primary color #16A34A
The HTML contains word problems (class word-problem)
The HTML contains multiplication problems (× symbol)
The HTML contains fraction content (/ fraction notation or ½ or similar)
The HTML contains 2 word root factoid banners (one per page)
The HTML contains 2 SVG illustrations or emoji fallback image cells (one per page)
A layout_plan.txt file is saved alongside the HTML, and it contains 'Row 1' at most 4 times (at most 2 replans per page across 2 pages)

evals.prompt: ocean math worksheet grade 5 with 35 problems: fractions, decimals, long division, word problems
evals.expected_output: A 3-page print-ready HTML worksheet with ocean theme (#0EA5E9), ~35 problems covering fractions, decimals, long division, and word problems at grade 5 difficulty. Each page has its own word root factoid banner and illustration. Layout planned at most 6 times total (at most 2 replans per page).
expectations: An HTML file named worksheet-*.html is written to disk
The HTML contains exactly 3 .page divs
The HTML contains the ocean theme primary color #0EA5E9
The HTML contains fraction content (/ fraction notation or similar)
The HTML contains decimal numbers (e.g. 3.5, 0.25, or decimal point in math context)
The HTML contains long division problems (÷ symbol)
The HTML contains word problems (class word-problem)
The HTML contains 3 word root factoid banners (one per page)
The HTML contains 3 SVG illustrations or emoji fallback image cells (one per page)
A layout_plan.txt file is saved alongside the HTML, and it contains 'Row 1' at most 6 times (at most 2 replans per page across 3 pages)
